response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The reference JSON is completely incorrect, specifying 'SLOW MOTION' which does not play. Instead, the actual songs are 'Dazzling My Dream' and 'スタースタート' (Star Start).
2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was ignored entirely due to song mismatch. Manual transcription and translation were performed 100% using native audio perception.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to vocal delivery and split into logical chunks. Extended instrumental segments are left silent.

subtitles.original: Dazzling My Dream かまわず dance, dance, dance, jump and dance, dance, dance
subtitles.english: Dazzling My Dream, don't care, just dance, dance, dance, jump and dance, dance, dance

subtitles.original: 声は闇に預けたまま
subtitles.english: With my voice left to the darkness

subtitles.original: 目を覚ましても 離れないで
subtitles.english: Even when I wake up, please don't leave me

subtitles.original: Maybe maybe 正気じゃないのよ
subtitles.english: Maybe, maybe I'm out of my mind

subtitles.original: 太陽が 忘れられない
subtitles.english: I can't forget the sun

subtitles.original: Darling darling そんなんじゃないから
subtitles.english: Darling, darling, it's not like that

subtitles.original: 独り占めして Euphoria
subtitles.english: Monopolize it, Euphoria

subtitles.original: 気にしてないような 言葉は装飾で
subtitles.english: Words that seem unconcerned are just decoration

subtitles.original: メイクのように 洗い流せない
subtitles.english: They can't be washed away like makeup

subtitles.original: 360度 偽りだって
subtitles.english: Even if 360 degrees of it are lies

subtitles.original: かき消せるような 私にかまって
subtitles.english: Pay attention to me, so I can drown them out

subtitles.original: Crazy crazy love 狂わせてよ
subtitles.english: Crazy, crazy love, drive me crazy

subtitles.original: 君の衝動は 私の深層心理を
subtitles.english: Your impulse triggers my deepest subconsciousness

subtitles.original: 繰り返さないのよ センチメンタルね
subtitles.english: I won't repeat it, how sentimental

subtitles.original: 過ぎ去ったネオン 三十数光年先
subtitles.english: The past neon lights are dozens of light-years away

subtitles.original: パノラマみたいに漂えば
subtitles.english: If I drift like a panorama

subtitles.original: 拒む 拒む間もなかった
subtitles.english: There was no time to even refuse

subtitles.original: 指先でまた 君を探している
subtitles.english: With my fingertips, I'm searching for you again

subtitles.original: その声を聞かせてよ
subtitles.english: Let me hear your voice

subtitles.original: 私にかまって 教えてよ
subtitles.english: Pay attention to me, tell me

subtitles.original: 恋の先の先を
subtitles.english: What lies far beyond love

subtitles.original: 広がってくサマータイム 君の存在は
subtitles.english: The spreading summertime, your existence...

subtitles.original: 私の脳内までも 飛び込んじゃうのよ 突き抜けてね
subtitles.english: ...jumps right into my brain, pierce through it

subtitles.original: 一世一代の dance, dance, dance, jump and dance, dance, dance
subtitles.english: A once-in-a-lifetime dance, dance, dance, jump and dance, dance, dance

subtitles.original: Dazzling My Dream かまわず dance, dance, dance, jump and dance, dance, dance
subtitles.english: Dazzling My Dream, don't care, just dance, dance, dance, jump and dance, dance, dance

subtitles.original: 声は闇に預けたまま
subtitles.english: With my voice left to the darkness

subtitles.original: 目を覚ましても 離れないで
subtitles.english: Even when I wake up, please don't leave me

subtitles.original: 一つ、病める時も
subtitles.english: First, in sickness,

subtitles.original: 健やかなるときも ずっと
subtitles.english: and in health, always,

subtitles.original: 愛を 歌い続けることを
subtitles.english: to keep singing of love,

subtitles.original: 堂々と誓います
subtitles.english: I solemnly vow.

subtitles.original: 二つ、ボーカル、ダンスも
subtitles.english: Second, vocal and dance,

subtitles.original: もっと追求します
subtitles.english: I will pursue them even more.

subtitles.original: 三つ、ずっと推してもらえる
subtitles.english: Third, to become an idol

subtitles.original: アイドルになってみせます
subtitles.english: you will always support.

subtitles.original: 四つ目、不安な未来も私が照らすんだ
subtitles.english: Fourth, even the uncertain future, I will light it up.

subtitles.original: それでも 落ち込んじゃう日は
subtitles.english: Even so, on days when you feel down,

subtitles.original: 思い出しているよ みんなのその笑顔
subtitles.english: I'll be remembering all of your smiles.
